scripts.install:all: npm install && cd eduassist-backend && npm install && cd ../eduassist-frontend && npm install
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.build:backend: cd eduassist-backend && npm run build 2>/dev/null || echo 'Backend ready'
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
scripts.test:backend: cd eduassist-backend && npm test 2>/dev/null || echo 'No tests'
scripts.test:frontend: cd eduassist-frontend && npm test 2>/dev/null || echo 'No tests'
scripts.lint: npm run lint:backend && npm run lint:frontend
scripts.lint:backend: cd eduassist-backend && npm run lint 2>/dev/null || echo 'No linter'
